use_when: Confirm row count, non-null count, dtypes, and memory use before analysis
lookahead_or_gotcha: Info prints to screen; use df.isnull().sum() for a reusable missing-value Series.

use_when: Summarize numeric columns with mean, std, min, quartiles, and max
lookahead_or_gotcha: Summary ignores object/string columns unless include is specified.

use_when: Fetch one or more columns or filter rows with boolean masks
lookahead_or_gotcha: df["Close"] is a Series; df[["Close"]] is a DataFrame.

use_when: Slice a time period or named rows/columns by labels
lookahead_or_gotcha: With label slices, the end label is included.
The stop position is excluded, like normal Python slicing.

use_when: Keep rows satisfying one or more conditions
lookahead_or_gotcha: Wrap each condition in parentheses when combining with & or |.

use_when: Show numeric output at a readable precision
lookahead_or_gotcha: Rounding display does not replace robust risk calculations.
axis=1 means columns; axis=0 means rows; reassign or inplace to persist.
